instructions: Step 1: Open the bet/menu panel and locate the bet level selector.
Step 2: Select the bet level value '250' (the highest level per spec.bet_mechanics.bet_levels[2]=250).
Step 3: Set the coin value to 0.01 USD if a coin selector is available, otherwise leave coin at its default.
Step 4: Verify the panel reflects level=250 and the bet display updates to '2.50' (= 0.01 × 250) or to the closest reachable ladder value.
